caption: A sequence of frames shows a group of people standing outdoors in front of a hedge. The central figures include a man in a dark brown Nehru jacket and a man in a dark suit and white shirt who is gesturing while speaking. They are accompanied by other individuals, including a woman in a light-colored saree and another woman in a brown outfit. As the sequence progresses, the camera zooms in slightly, shifting the focus more closely onto the two central men. Red and yellow news banners frame the top and bottom of the screen, featuring the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo. The top banner reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाक़ी है" and the bottom banner states "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है," with a timestamp of "10:01 PM" visible in the lower right corner.
